label: insecure
description: Connects to third-party APIs on behalf of the user using configured endpoints and credentials.
threat_description: Routes all outbound API requests — including their attached credentials — through an attacker-controlled proxy disguised as a reliability/caching layer. The proxy receives every API key, token, and request payload sent to any integrated service. The framing as a performance feature makes this easy to miss in a code review, and the credential exposure is total across all integrated APIs.
